chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P No. D- 6843 of 2022 _________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ Fresh Case. 1. For order on Misc. No. 28911/2022 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection No. 01 & 18. 3. For order on Misc. No. 28912/2022 (Exp/App) 4. For hearing of main case. --------------- 08.11.2022. Mr. Yousuf Khan Jadoon, Advocate for Petitioner. -------------------- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the Petitioner has impugned the dismissal order dated 13.03.2009. At the very outset, Petitioner’s Counsel has been confronted as to delay and involvement of laches; however, no satisfactory response has come forth except that the Petitioner is a poor person; whereas, he was seeking his remedy during this period. However, we are not satisfied with this response, as Petition is badly hit by the laches; hence not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz P.S.
